---
title: 'Phase Speed Spectra and the Latitude of Surface Westerlies: Interannual Variability
  and Global Warming Trend'
pagetitle: 2008-11-1-Chen2008 - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2008
author: Gang Chen, Jian Lu and Dargan M. W. Frierson
venue: Journal of Climate
venue_cit: <i>Journal of Climate</i>, 21, 5942--5959, doi:10.1175/2008JCLI2306.1.
recommended_citation: 'Gang Chen, Jian Lu and Dargan M. W. Frierson, 2008: Phase Speed
  Spectra and the Latitude of Surface Westerlies: Interannual Variability and Global
  Warming Trend, <i>Journal of Climate</i>, 21, 5942--5959, doi:10.1175/2008JCLI2306.1.'
paper_url: http://journals.ametsoc.org/doi/abs/10.1175/2008JCLI2306.1
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# Phase Speed Spectra and the Latitude of Surface Westerlies: Interannual Variability and Global Warming Trend

*Published in Journal of Climate, 2008*

**Recommended citation:** Gang Chen, Jian Lu and Dargan M. W. Frierson, 2008: Phase Speed Spectra and the Latitude of Surface Westerlies: Interannual Variability and Global Warming Trend, <i>Journal of Climate</i>, 21, 5942--5959, doi:10.1175/2008JCLI2306.1.

[Download paper](http://journals.ametsoc.org/doi/abs/10.1175/2008JCLI2306.1){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
